core_mechanism: emergence of a collective macro-state from repeated local update interactions among heterogeneous units coupled on a network (an interacting-agent / opinion-dynamics process in which local, memory-dependent update rules aggregate into nonlinear macroscopic behavior)
brief_reason: The abstract couples heterogeneous agents on social networks through multi-round communication where local cognitive update modules (memory, prompt diversity) drive individual decisions that aggregate into emergent, nonlinear macro-level opinion dynamics.
